case_title: BIER, LANCE vs. RIPPER, TOMMY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIPPER, TOMMY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 665 EDDY STREET #51, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E THROUGH MIDNIGHT 4-30-96. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE ON OR BEFORE 4-30-96, PLTF MAY EVICT ON 5-1-96 WITH NO NOTICE TO DEFT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES. GENERAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES. DEFT WAIVES RETURN OF ANY SECURITY DEPOSIT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIER, LANCE AS TO DEFENDANT RIPPER, TOMMY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT RIPPER, TOMMY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIER, LANCE SERVED MAR-21-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIPPER, TOMMY
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIER, LANCE SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-16-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RIPPER, TOMMY
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT RIPPER, TOMMY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

DEPT 1/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:BELDON YEE/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ATNY S. LITTMAN APPEARED FOR PLTF. DEFT LANCE BIER APPEARED IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED PREAPRED JUDGMENT.
